  - headline: "Major appliance defects must be reported within 48 hours of delivery."
    detail: "Refrigerators, washers, dryers, ranges, dishwashers, and over-the-range microwaves: call 1-800-455-3869 within 48 hours (weekends excluded) or you lose your right to return or exchange."
  - headline: "Special orders may carry a 15% restocking fee."
    detail: "Items special-ordered for your project may be subject to a 15% restocking fee if returned, and must be returned to the same store where you placed the order."
